name: Profile_R5_MedicinalProductDefinition_R4_MedicinalProduct
title: Cross-version Profile for R5.MedicinalProductDefinition resource for use in FHIR R4
description: This cross-version profile allows R5 MedicinalProductDefinition resource content to be represented via FHIR R4 MedicinalProduct resources.

element.short: Cross-version Profile for R5.MedicinalProductDefinition resource for use in FHIR R4
element.definition: This cross-version profile allows R5 MedicinalProductDefinition resource content to be represented via FHIR R4 MedicinalProduct resources.

element.short: R5: A business identifier relating to a specific version of the product (new)
element.comment:
Element `MedicinalProductDefinition.version` has a context of MedicinalProduct based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `MedicinalProduct`.
Element `MedicinalProductDefinition.version` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: domain additional types
element.definition: R5: `MedicinalProductDefinition.domain` additional types (CodeableConcept) additional types from child elements (text)
element.comment:
Element `MedicinalProductDefinition.domain` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `MedicinalProduct.domain` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The mappings for `MedicinalProductDefinition.domain` do not cover the following types: CodeableConcept.
The mappings for `MedicinalProductDefinition.domain` do not cover the following types based on type expansion: text.

element.definition: R5: `MedicinalProductDefinition.specialMeasures` additional types (CodeableConcept) additional types from child elements (coding)

element.definition: R5: `MedicinalProductDefinition.packagedMedicinalProduct` additional types (CodeableConcept) additional types from child elements (coding, text)

element.short: R5: Additional documentation about the medicinal product additional types
element.definition: R5: `MedicinalProductDefinition.attachedDocument` additional types from child elements (display, identifier, reference, type)
element.comment:
Element `MedicinalProductDefinition.attachedDocument` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `MedicinalProduct.attachedDocument` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The mappings for `MedicinalProductDefinition.attachedDocument` do not cover the following types based on type expansion: display, identifier, reference, type.
The standard extension `alternate-reference` has been mapped as the representation of FHIR R5 element `MedicinalProductDefinition.attachedDocument` with unmapped reference targets: DocumentReference.

element.short: R5: A master file for the medicinal product (e.g. Pharmacovigilance System Master File) additional types
